COMPANY
OPEN ACCOUNT

PHOTOS & NOTES

Create the restaurant-ready hood cleaning report.

Add job photos if you have them. One short note is enough when the crew needs a clean report link and PDF for the restaurant.

QUICK START

PHOTOS OPTIONAL
STEP 1
Add photos or notes
Drop the phone batch if you have it. One written note is enough to start.
STEP 2
Confirm what happened
Pick the result and correct only the uncertain parts before sending.
STEP 3
Share link or save PDF
Use the customer link for delivery and the PDF copy for records.

JOB PHOTOS

Drop photos if you have them

Before, after, fan, filter, access, label, and issue photos can all go in one batch.

CHOOSE PHOTOS
Photos optional
Saved with report
OPTIONAL NOTE

WHAT WAS INCLUDED?

Hood cleaning

Hood, duct, fan, and grease path expected.

Leave standard unless this visit was filters-only, fan-only, access revisit, or condition
